_comment: Per-functionality accuracy gates for HateCheck-XR, enforced in CI only when MODEL_DIR is set (real model). Values are intentionally conservative floors meant to catch regressions, not targets; calibrate them against your own measured results before relying on them.
_comment_ceilings: The *_max keys are CEILINGS, not floors: the build fails if the directional error rate exceeds them. hateful_as_clean_max targets the dominant OOD error the thesis found (hateful content confidently misread as Clean); clean_as_hateful_max targets the reverse over-moderation direction (counterspeech/quotation/negation/homonyms misread as Hateful), which the thesis also found sizable. Where to set each ceiling is exactly the recall-vs-precision decision the thesis says a deployment must make explicitly. Placeholder values — calibrate against measured results.
